style_effects: Molten lava cracks glow intensely along Pikachu's fur, emitting vibrant orange and crimson ember sparks that drift upward in lazy spirals. A crackling energy aura pulses in warm amber waves around its body, casting flickering shadows that mimic dancing flames. The lighting mood is a searing, dynamic glow of molten fire, with smoke trails curling from its tail as it moves. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
